history.reasoning: The node is experiencing critical anomalies due to severe performance degradation and operational failures. Specifically, Packet Loss (12% vs <2%), Throughput (18 Mbps vs ~300 Mbps expected), and Failed Handovers (8/10 attempts vs <10%) are all significantly outside the normal operational thresholds. While the RF Module Temperature is currently acceptable (71°C), the overall service quality and operational stability are severely compromised.
